items.title: Made it out alive!
items.description: In public matches, escape the match alive for a total of 100 times.

items.title: Backdoor Escape
items.description: In a public match, escape through the hatch.

items.title: The Key to Escape
items.description: Escape through the Hatch using a Key in a public match.

items.title: I've got your back
items.description: In public matches, save a total of 50 survivors from death.

items.title: No one left behind
items.description: In a public match, rescue someone after at least one gate has opened.

items.title: Medic
items.description: In public matches, heal others for a total of 100 health states.

items.title: Handyman
items.description: In public matches, repair generators for a total of 100 full repairs.

items.title: Nerves of steel
items.description: In public matches, get a total of 500 successful Skill-Checks.

items.title: Perfect Escape
items.description: In a public match, as a survivor, complete with at least 5000 blood points in each score category.

items.title: Perfect Killing
items.description: In a public match, as a killer, complete with at least 5000 blood points in each score category.

items.title: Zealous
items.description: In a public match, get more than 8K blood points in one scoring category.

items.title: It wakes
items.description: Raise a character level to 10.

items.title: Not half bad
items.description: Raise a character level to 25.

items.title: Bloody Millionaire
items.description: Accumulate a total of 1 million blood points. (blood points can be spent before reaching the total)

items.title: Expert survivor
items.description: Reach survivor online grade Silver I.

items.title: Master survivor
items.description: Reach survivor online grade Gold I.

items.title: Legendary survivor
items.description: Reach survivor online grade Iridescent I.

items.title: Expert Killer
items.description: Reach killer online grade Silver I.

items.title: Master Killer
items.description: Reach killer online grade Gold I.

items.title: Legendary Killer
items.description: Reach Killer Iridescent I.

items.title: Apt Survivor
items.description: Start a public match with a full survivor loadout.

items.title: Apt Killer
items.description: Start a public match with a full killer loadout.

items.title: Risk it all
items.description: In a public match, as a survivor, use a visceral item or add-on without using a protective ward.

items.title: Survival Treasures
items.description: In a public match, escape while bringing a new item to the campfire.

items.title: Vulture
items.description: In a public match, escape with an item that another player brought into the match.

items.title: Skillful
items.description: Boost any perk to level 3.

items.title: I
items.description: Reach prestige Level I with any character.

items.title: II
items.description: Reach prestige Level II with any character.

items.title: III
items.description: Reach prestige Level III with any character.

items.title: III-50
items.description: Reach prestige Level III-50 with any character.

items.title: Key to Success
items.description: In a public match, use a key to open a chest.

items.title: Working Overtime
items.description: In a single public match, repair generators for at least 300 seconds.

items.title: All Aboard
items.description: In a public match, activate the Foghorn by repairing the generator in the Steamboat and escape.

items.title: Taking One For The Team
items.description: Protect a recently unhooked Survivor by taking a hit near them 250 times.

items.title: Engineer
items.description: In public matches, repair a Generator in the Damage state , 50 Times. One time per generator.

items.title: Leapfrog
items.description: In public matches, jump over a pallet or through a window during a chase, 200 times.

items.title: Mad House
items.description: In a public match, bring the 4 survivors to insanity Tier 3 at least once in the same match.

items.title: Sorted
items.description: In a public match, spend most of the trial injured (more than 50%) and live to tell the story.

items.title: Swirling Death
items.description: In public matches, throw 1000 Hatchets.

items.title: Looter
items.description: In public matches, unlock 100 chests.

items.title: Near-Death Experience
items.description: In public matches, get downed only once and escape the match alive, 25 times.

items.title: Cherish your Life
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in The Game's Bathroom and live to tell the story.

items.title: Campbell's Chapel Legacy
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the chapel and live to tell the tale.

items.title: Whiffing to Success
items.description: In public matches, cause the killer to miss an attack before taking a vault, 50 times.

items.title: Outrage
items.description: In public matches, during a chase, damage a Survivor who drops a Pallet within a chase, 100 times.

items.title: Unforgettable Getaway
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the Chalet and live to tell the tale.

items.title: Heavy Burden
items.description: In public matches, hit 25 different individual Survivors while carrying another Survivor.

items.title: Wounded Healer
items.description: In public matches, heal other Survivors for a total of 50 health states while you are also injured.

items.title: Devoted Gatekeeping
items.description: In public matches, sacrifice all survivors before the last generator is repaired, 15 times.

items.title: Cutting Out
items.description: In public matches, while The Killer is carrying you, wiggle out of The Killer's grasp 10 times.

items.title: Silent Approach
items.description: In public matches, interrupt and grab 25 Survivors while they are repairing generators.

items.title: Denied!
items.description: In public matches, close the hatch 30 times.

items.title: Operation: Survival
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the Treatment Theatre’s operation theatre and escape.

items.title: Grim Pilgrimage
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the upper level of the Shrine and escape.

items.title: Bodyguard
items.description: In public matches, take a protection hit while the Killer is carrying a Survivor, 30 times.

items.title: Selfless Survival
items.description: Heal a Survivor from the dying state to the injured state 30 times in public matches.

items.title: Death of Ignorance
items.description: Down a Survivor suffering from the Oblivious status effect 15 times in public matches.

items.title: Healthy Obsession
items.description: Heal other Survivors marked as the Obsession for a total of 10 health states in public matches.

items.title: I See You
items.description: Down 30 Survivors suffering from the Exposed status effect in public matches.

items.title: Every Last Drop
items.description: Deplete 30 items in public matches.

items.title: Rescue Mission
items.description: Stun the Killer with a pallet while they are carrying a Survivor 5 times.

items.title: Power Moves
items.description: Equip 0 perks, repair generators for a total of 1 full repair and escape 8 times in public matches.

items.title: Multi-tasker
items.description: Down 30 Survivors while carrying another Survivor in public matches.

items.title: Insult and Injury
items.description: Escape a chase 50 times after stunning the Killer with a pallet in public matches.

items.title: Close Shave
items.description: Dodge basic attacks or projectiles 100 times in public matches.

items.title: Preemptive Strike
items.description: Hook a Survivor in a public match before any generators have been fully repaired.

items.title: Raccoon City Recruit
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator on the 1st floor of the RPD station’s main hall and escape.

items.title: Neither Seen Nor Heard
items.description: Apply the Oblivious status effect to Survivors 30 times in public matches.

items.title: Lost All Hope
items.description: Down a Survivor within the bounds of any Exit Gate.

items.title: Humanitarian
items.description: Affect other Survivors with positive status effects 50 times in public matches.

items.title: With Scars to Show
items.description: Go from healthy to injured during a chase and escape. Do this 50 times in public matches.

items.title: Viral Video
items.description: Apply Condemned on Survivors 30 times in public matches.

items.title: Ghost in the Machine
items.description: Damage 50 generators while Undetectable in public matches.

items.title: Triage
items.description: When a Survivor is injured far away, heal them 30 times without travelling more than 16 meters.

items.title: From the Deep
items.description: Grab a Survivor hiding inside a locker 25 times in public matches.

items.title: Collision Course
items.description: Slam one Survivor into another 10 times in public matches.

items.title: A Fast Death
items.description: Damage a Survivor with the Haste Status effect 8 times in public matches.

items.title: Lifting The Fog
items.description: Reveal the Killer's aura 50 times in public matches.

items.title: Chorus of Chaos
items.description: In public matches, make 30 unique survivors scream.

items.title: Hack the Mainframe
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator by the command center on Shelter Woods and escape.

items.title: Complete the Evolution
items.description: In public matches, injure or down 3 Survivors who are Hindered.

items.title: Extraterrestrial
items.description: In a public match, complete the generator at the base on Toba Landing and escape.

items.title: One More Step
items.description: In public matches, take a hit while you have the Endurance status effect 10 times.

items.title: Second Act
items.description: In public matches, recover from dying by yourself or with help 10 times.

items.title: Make Some Noise
items.description: In public matches, scream 50 times.

items.title: Disarm and Dismember
items.description: In public matches, hit 50 Survivors holding a Special Item.

items.title: MU/TH/UR Dearest
items.description: In a public match, complete the generator at the mess hall in the Nostromo Wreckage and escape.

items.title: Kitted Out
items.description: In 35 different public matches, pick up and use at least one Special Item as a Survivor.

items.title: Outta Nowhere
items.description: In public matches, hit 40 Survivors with a basic attack while you are Undetectable.

items.title: Under Pressure
items.description: In public matches, perform 20 great skill checks while injured.

items.title: Shine On
items.description: In public matches, blind the Killer with a flashlight 30 times.

items.title: What Lurks Beneath
items.description: In public matches, injure Survivors while in the Basement 25 times.

items.title: Fearless Healer
items.description: In public matches, heal a total of 25 Health States while in the Basement.

items.title: Tanuki in the Fog
items.description: Discover a hidden guardian at the Yamaoka Estate.

items.title: Desperate Escape
items.description: In public matches, perform a fast vault within 3 seconds of getting hit 15 times.

items.title: Resourceful
items.description: In public matches, swap held Survivor items for new ones from chests 10 times (max once per chest).

items.title: Taste the Darkness
items.description: In public matches, interrupt 10 Survivors while they are performing a vault.

items.title: Honor the Bloodline
items.description: In public matches, reveal the Killer's aura for a total of 60 seconds in a single trial.

items.title: Hero of Wallachia
items.description: In public matches, pallet stun the Killer 10 times while holding a rare, common, or uncommon item.

items.title: Deadly Plunge
items.description: In public matches, as a Killer, fall a combined distance of 1000 meters.

items.title: Awakened Anger
items.description: In public matches, damage a Survivor who just blinded you within 30 seconds.

items.title: Final Days
items.description: In public matches, take 10 protection hits during the Endgame Collapse.

items.title: Ever Vigilant
items.description: In public matches, complete 20 healing actions on Survivors once all generators have been completed.

items.title: None the Wiser
items.description: In public matches, hit 5 Survivors that are Oblivious.

items.title: Death Flight
items.description: Injure Survivors after you vaulted during a chase 20 times in public matches.

items.title: The Show Must Go On
items.description: In public matches, finish repairing 10 generators while injured.

items.title: Practice Makes Perfect
items.description: In public matches, succeed in 100 healing or repair skill checks.

items.title: Torn Asunder
items.description: In public matches, damage a Survivor using the Vine or Undergate Attacks 50 times.

items.title: Master Manipulator
items.description: In public matches, damage a Survivor while they are healing another or repairing 5 times.

items.title: Stranger Sightings
items.description: Reveal or see the Killer's aura 11 times in a single trial in a public match.

items.title: The Grind
items.description: In public matches, with the Hillbilly, chainsaw a total of 100 survivors.

items.title: Gifts for the Fog
items.description: In a public match, burn a Visceral offering.

items.title: Hemophobia
items.description: In a public match, escape the Disturbed Ward without losing a single drop of blood.

items.title: Shock Therapy
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator on the second floor of the Disturbed Ward and escape.

items.title: Prized Possession
items.description: As a Killer, finish a public match with at least one Hex totem standing.

items.title: Item of Obsession
items.description: In a public match, as the killer's obsession, escape as the last survivor without getting hit.

items.title: Deep Cleansing
items.description: In public matches, cleanse 100 Hex totems.

items.title: Even Punishment
items.description: In a public match, teleport to your Phantasm traps and hit all 4 individual survivors at least once.

items.title: Left For Dead
items.description: As the last person still alive, activate the last generator and escape through the exit gate.

items.title: Adept Min
items.description: In a public match, escape with Min using only her 3 unique perks.

items.title: Cottage Owner
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the Mother's Dwelling and live to tell the story.

items.title: Dream Demon
items.description: In public matches, pull 200 Survivors into the Dream World.

items.title: Milk 'n' Cookies
items.description: In a public match, take the item from the chest in the basement in at least 30 different trials.

items.title: Happy Holidays
items.description: Open at least 100 mystery boxes on the bloodweb (available during select special events).

items.title: Adept Tapp
items.description: In a public match, escape with Detective Tapp using only his 3 unique perks.

items.title: Ancestor's Rite
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the Family Residence and live to tell the tale.

items.title: Not Today
items.description: In public matches, unhook yourself 50 times.

items.title: Shrine Apparatus
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the Temple basement and live to tell the tale.

items.title: Outrun Evil
items.description: In a public match, crawl your way out through the hatch.

items.title: Adept Ash
items.description: In a public match, escape with Ash using only his 3 unique perks.

items.title: Totally Vulnerable
items.description: In public matches, with Ghost Face, down 50 Marked Survivors.

items.title: Expert Generalist
items.description: Escape 8 times while repairing the equivalent of 1 generator with only 2 universal perks equipped.

items.title: Skilled Generalist
items.description: Escape 8 times while repairing the equivalent of 1 generator with only 3 universal perks equipped.

items.title: Quick Draw
items.description: Interrupt a Survivor cleansing a Totem 10 times in public matches.

items.title: Old West Oasis
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the Saloon and escape.

items.title: Classy Act
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in Midwich School's music room or chem lab and escape.

items.title: One Thousand Cuts
items.description: Deal maximum Laceration on Survivors 50 times in public matches.

items.title: Beyond Broken
items.description: Injure a Survivor afflicted by the Broken Status Effect with a Basic Attack a total of 50 times.

items.title: Bless You
items.description: Bless a Hex totem 20 times in public matches.

items.title: Flight to Freedom
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the eyrie and escape.

items.title: Fleet of Foot
items.description: Help other Survivors by increasing their movement speed 50 times.

items.title: Outrun the Overlap
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the main house in the Garden of Joy and escape.

items.title: Hiding Seeker
items.description: In a public match, end a chase against any Killer by hiding inside a locker 35 times.

items.title: Outbreak Breakout
items.description: Open the exit gates and escape from Raccoon City Police Department 20 times in public matches.

items.title: Rebuilding The Borgo
items.description: In a public match, repair the generator in the main house in the Shattered Square and escape.

items.title: Adept Cage
items.description: Escape with Nicolas Cage using only his 3 unique perks in a public match.

items.title: Adept Ripley
items.description: Escape with Ellen Ripley using only her 3 unique perks in a public match.

items.title: Movie Buff
items.description: In a public match, complete the generator inside the movie theater in Greenville Square and escape.

items.title: Dungeon Crawler
items.description: In a public match, complete the generator inside the torture room in the Forgotten Ruins and escape.

items.title: Hand-Eye Coordination
items.description: Find and use the Hand or Eye of Vecna and escape a Trial.

items.title: Adept Troupe
items.description: Escape with Aestri or Baermar using only their 3 unique perks in a public match.

items.title: Break For It
items.description: In public matches, escape a match while being Broken a total of 5 times.

items.title: Bloodied Hands
items.description: In public matches, safely unhook Survivors while being Broken a total of 10 times.

items.title: Don’t Open, Dead Inside
items.description: In a public match, complete the generator at the Fallen Refuge and escape.

items.title: 1 hidden achievement remaining
items.description: Details for each achievement will be revealed once unlocked
